title: justicia dumetorum
intro: Justicia dumetorum, also known as the thicket justicia or forest justicia, is a plant species within the Acanthaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Justicia dumetorum include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
